hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Thank you for using HEIC JPG NOW. If you have questions, suggestions, bug reports, or rights-related requests, please reach out to us here.

toc.label: 2. What You Can Contact Us About

sections.title: 1. How to Reach Us
body: We provide support by email. Please write to guom0900@gmail.com. After reviewing your message, we will reply as soon as possible.

sections.title: 2. What You Can Contact Us About
body: Feel free to contact us about any of the following.
list: Questions about how to use the tool
Bug reports, display issues, or conversion failures

sections.title: 3. Response Time
body: We usually reply within 1 to 3 business days.
Response times may be longer on weekends, public holidays, or during high-volume periods.

sections.title: 4. Before You Email Us
body: To help us investigate faster, please include your environment details when possible (device, OS, browser) and a brief description of what happened.
list: Please do not send sensitive information such as passwords, card numbers, or government-issued ID numbers.
If attachments contain personal information, please make sure they are necessary and limited to the minimum required.

sections.title: 5. How We Handle Personal Information
body: Email addresses and message content you send to us are used only to handle your request and provide follow-up support.
For more details, please review our Privacy Policy.

contact.title: Contact Details
contact.description: Please contact us at the email address below.
contact.response: We usually reply within 1 to 3 business days.
